name: savemycontext
description: Log Codex sessions to SaveMyContext and migrate complete context bundles across AI interfaces.

interface.longDescription: Captures Codex turns into SaveMyContext and produces portable context bundles for Codex, Claude, and web AI handoffs.

Export a complete context handoff for another AI interface.
